text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Spring Stakes...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a prelude to an even bigger event, this race
would normally be something to get excited over,
but...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What? Five participants?! That's just barely
enough to make a race!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Every year, this race has ten or more runners in it!
What's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Before today, if you had told me there would only
be five people in this race, I would've thought
you were crazy...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ah... Haha... There's really only five of us...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The reason so many Umamusume are avoiding
this one could likely be because she's here...
choice_data_list: Let's just focus on performing at your best.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's still a race, so we should enjoy it! Time to
focus!
